testcase.name: test_05_verify_device1_orders_exist
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multi_device_offline_sync_iter110.py:215: in test_05_verify_device1_orders_exist assert order["is_offline_order"] == True ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'is_offline_order'

testcase.name: test_11_verify_dashboard_stats_include_synced_orders

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('total_orders' in {'all_time': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, 'current_date': '2026-03-05', 'current_shift': {'branch_id': 'b45125b7-b7d3-48c6-9386-a95fcf773132', 'card_sales': 0.0, 'cash_difference': None, 'cash_sales': 0.0, ...}, 'month': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, ...} or 'orders_count' in {'all_time': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, 'current_date': '2026-03-05', 'current_shift': {'branch_id': 'b45125b7-b7d3-48c6-9386-a95fcf773132', 'card_sales': 0.0, 'cash_difference': None, 'cash_sales': 0.0, ...}, 'month': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, ...} or 'today_orders' in {'all_time': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, 'current_date': '2026-03-05', 'current_shift': {'branch_id': 'b45125b7-b7d3-48c6-9386-a95fcf773132', 'card_sales': 0.0, 'cash_difference': None, 'cash_sales': 0.0, ...}, 'month': {'average_order_value': 45711.6976744186, 'by_payment_method': {'card': 10698.0, 'cash': 1801785.0, 'credit': 144000.0, 'pending': 9120.0}, 'gross_profit': 1059300.0, 'operating_costs': 5350000.0, ...}, ...})
